calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-01-2012 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-05-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Paul Alvarado, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Susan Crozier #4761
John Erickson, Esq. for the Plaintiff: V.Y. Bush Street Investor LLC.,
Plaintiff's Witness Troy Crosby was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by Defendant Mark L. Pettinari ind., dba Lasw Offices of Mark L. Pettinari.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for Judgment as follows:
Back-due rent and damages $74,347.07
Late Fees 4,074.39$
Prejudgment Interest $5,127.71
For a total of $83,549.17
Attorney fees and costs per memo of costs.
Counsel to prepare the Judgment was submitted to Dept. 514 for signature.

10-05-12
Judgment granted and signed.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-18-2012 Set For Trial On Oct-01-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

UD COURT TRIALS
Off Calendar May-03-2012 Off Calendar
